cells.rationale: Subtle probe-lifecycle race (timeout-before-open leak, id-attribution, precise self-exemption that must not re-open the cap) across three worker files makes this a correctness-invariant early proof point.

A liveness watchdog whose false-trip fatalExits the daemon demands reasoning over a multi-term starvation conjunction, arrival-clock staleness, and a clock-jump reset — a subtle correctness invariant on a new worker-main protocol.
Open-ended characterize-before-fixing plus a re-fold-time-bomb fan-out bound and an abandonment reap predicate that must not half-kill a live viewer is subtle-invariant, investigation-shaped work.

Kernel-flock single-instance gate with FD_CLOEXEC/inherited-fd hazards that could wedge every future boot, macOS-arm64 silent-failure modes, and ownership-checked unlinks is a subtle concurrency-correctness invariant.

Append-only NDJSON ledger with boot_id keying, torn-tail tolerance, mid-incident legacy dual-read, exit-path-safe append, and runtime-qualified counting that must avoid per-boot double-count carries several subtle correctness invariants.
